summary: Phase 2 Retailer Dashboard testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All tested flows working correctly - login, dashboard metrics, orders, grievances, messaging, B2B placeholder page.

Backend APIs.POST /api/retailer-auth/login: PASSED - Returns token and retailer data
Backend APIs.GET /api/retailer-dashboard/performance: PASSED - Returns metrics (orders, completion rate, revenue)
Backend APIs.GET /api/retailer-dashboard/orders: PASSED - Returns orders list with status counts

Frontend Flows.Retailer Login Page: PASSED - Clean UI with data-testid attributes
Frontend Flows.Dashboard Page: PASSED - Shows all metrics (orders, completion rate, revenue, etc.)
Frontend Flows.Orders Page: PASSED - Status filters, search, empty state
Frontend Flows.Grievances Page: PASSED - List view, new grievance form, submission
Frontend Flows.Messages Page: PASSED - Inbox/Sent tabs, compose form, district info
Frontend Flows.B2B Orders Page: PASSED - Placeholder page with coming soon message
Frontend Flows.Mobile Responsiveness: PASSED - Dashboard displays correctly on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All retailer auth endpoints working correctly with token-based authentication
✓ Session validation handles both cookie and Authorization header
✓ Dashboard metrics aggregation working (total orders, completion rate, revenue)
✓ Grievance creation and listing working with proper validation
✓ Inter-retailer messaging restricted to same district (Central Delhi)
✓ B2B ordering is MOCKED/PLACEHOLDER as expected
✓ Frontend data-testid attributes present for testing
✓ Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI Test Grievance and TEST_Automated Test Grievance during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retailer Dashboard Phase 2 complete. Retailer karolbagh@addrika.com in Central Delhi district has no assigned orders (0 orders count). Created test grievances during testing. B2B ordering is MOCKED (placeholder). No other retailers in Central Delhi district for messaging tests. Admin retailer endpoints require 2FA authentication.
